name: repair_fill_sorry_rev
script:
lemma "rev (rev xs) = xs"
  sorry

name: repair_missing_using_and_comm
script:
lemma "A \<and> B \<longrightarrow> B \<and> A"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> B"
  show "B \<and> A"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_wrong_method_and_comm
script:
lemma "A \<and> B \<longrightarrow> B \<and> A"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> B"
  show "B \<and> A"
    by arith
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_proof_rev
script:
lemma "rev (rev xs) = xs"
proof
  show "rev xs = xs"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_fill_sorry_append_nil_right
script:
lemma "xs @ [] = xs"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_append_nil_left
script:
lemma "[] @ xs = xs"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_append_assoc
script:
lemma "(xs @ ys) @ zs = xs @ (ys @ zs)"
  sorry

script:
lemma "rev (rev xs) = xs"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_rev_append
goal: rev (xs @ ys) = rev ys @ rev xs
script:
lemma "rev (xs @ ys) = rev ys @ rev xs"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_length_append
goal: length (xs @ ys) = length xs + length ys
script:
lemma "length (xs @ ys) = length xs + length ys"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_length_rev
script:
lemma "length (rev xs) = length xs"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_length_map
script:
lemma "length (map f xs) = length xs"

name: repair_fill_sorry_map_append
goal: map f (xs @ ys) = map f xs @ map f ys
script:
lemma "map f (xs @ ys) = map f xs @ map f ys"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_map_map
goal: map f (map g xs) = map (f \<circ> g) xs
script:
lemma "map f (map g xs) = map (f \<circ> g) xs"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_filter_append
goal: filter P (xs @ ys) = filter P xs @ filter P ys
script:
lemma "filter P (xs @ ys) = filter P xs @ filter P ys"

name: repair_fill_sorry_filter_filter
goal: filter P (filter Q xs) = filter (\<lambda>x. P x \<and> Q x) xs
script:
lemma "filter P (filter Q xs) = filter (\<lambda>x. P x \<and> Q x) xs"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_take_zero
script:
lemma "take 0 xs = []"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_drop_zero
script:
lemma "drop 0 xs = xs"

name: repair_fill_sorry_take_length_append
script:
lemma "take (length xs) (xs @ ys) = xs"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_drop_length_append
script:
lemma "drop (length xs) (xs @ ys) = ys"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_take_all
script:
lemma "take (length xs) xs = xs"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_drop_all
script:
lemma "drop (length xs) xs = []"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_hd_cons
script:
lemma "hd (x # xs) = x"
  sorry

name: repair_fill_sorry_tl_cons

script:

proof
  assume h: "\<not> A \<and> \<not> B"
  show "\<not> (A \<or> B)"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_length_map
script:
lemma "length (map f xs) = length xs"
proof
  show "length xs = length xs"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_length_append
goal: length (xs @ ys) = length xs + length ys
script:
lemma "length (xs @ ys) = length xs + length ys"
proof
  show "length xs = length xs"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_map_append
goal: map f (xs @ ys) = map f xs @ map f ys
script:
lemma "map f (xs @ ys) = map f xs @ map f ys"
proof
  show "map f xs = map f xs"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_filter_append
goal: filter P (xs @ ys) = filter P xs @ filter P ys
script:
lemma "filter P (xs @ ys) = filter P xs @ filter P ys"
proof
  show "filter P xs = filter P xs"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_set_append
goal: set (xs @ ys) = set xs \<union> set ys
script:
lemma "set (xs @ ys) = set xs \<union> set ys"
proof
  show "set xs = set xs"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_nat_add_comm
script:
lemma "m + n = n + (m::nat)"
proof
  show "m = (m::nat)"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_nat_mul_comm
script:
lemma "m * n = n * (m::nat)"
proof
  show "m = (m::nat)"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_append_assoc
script:
lemma "(xs @ ys) @ zs = xs @ (ys @ zs)"
proof
  show "xs @ ys = xs @ ys"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_rev_append
goal: rev (xs @ ys) = rev ys @ rev xs
script:
lemma "rev (xs @ ys) = rev ys @ rev xs"
proof
  show "rev xs = rev xs"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_foldr_append
goal: foldr f (xs @ ys) z = foldr f xs (foldr f ys z)
script:
lemma "foldr f (xs @ ys) z = foldr f xs (foldr f ys z)"
proof
  show "foldr f xs z = foldr f xs z"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_wrong_induction_variable
script:
lemma "length (replicate n x) = n"
proof (induction x)
  case 0 show ?case by simp
next
  case (Suc x) show ?case by simp
qed

name: repair_wrong_induct_zip
goal: length (zip xs ys) = min (length xs) (length ys)
script:
lemma "length (zip xs ys) = min (length xs) (length ys)"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons a as) show ?case by simp
qed

name: repair_missing_case_split
goal: filter P (filter Q xs) = filter (\<lambda>x. P x \<and> Q x) xs
script:
lemma "filter P (filter Q xs) = filter (\<lambda>x. P x \<and> Q x) xs"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons a as) show ?case by simp
qed

name: repair_wrong_show_goal_rev
script:
lemma "rev (rev xs) = xs"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show "rev (rev as) = as"
    using Cons.IH by simp
qed

name: repair_extra_fill_sorry_bool_and_comm
script:
lemma "P \<and> Q \<longleftrightarrow> Q \<and> P"
  sorry

name: repair_extra_fill_sorry_bool_or_comm
script:
lemma "P \<or> Q \<longleftrightarrow> Q \<or> P"
  sorry

name: repair_extra_fill_sorry_bool_and_assoc
script:
lemma "(P \<and> Q) \<and> R \<longleftrightarrow> P \<and> (Q \<and> R)"
  sorry

name: repair_extra_fill_sorry_bool_or_assoc
script:
lemma "(P \<or> Q) \<or> R \<longleftrightarrow> P \<or> (Q \<or> R)"
  sorry

name: repair_extra_fill_sorry_bool_distrib_and_or
script:
lemma "P \<and> (Q \<or> R) \<longleftrightarrow> (P \<and> Q) \<or> (P \<and> R)"
  sorry
